description: §21.2 — exporting a `const` (`export const total = 42`) is a legal Form-2 export; E-EXPORT-001 stays silent (a const is in the exportable set, not a reactive cell).
rationale: §21.2: `const` is in the Form-2 exportable set (type / function / fn / const / let). Exporting `total` is legal, so E-EXPORT-001 must not fire — the clean twin of the state-cell export case.
